item.text: I’m using `writing-editor` to run the assignment through its editorial gates, with `writing` for the prose craft and `writing-fragments` if this is substantial original work. I’ll first inspect the task and establish the required workspace before drafting.
The first read hit a shell sandbox issue before returning any file contents. I’m retrying with a non-login shell; no editorial work has been skipped.

content.text:
{"resources":[{"server":"codex_apps","uri":"plugin://plugin_asdk_app_6944fb902e588191a8d2c78c59057984","name":"plugin_asdk_app_6944fb902e588191a8d2c78c59057984","title":"Awesome Slides","description":"One-stop AI slide app: create, edit, and export slides as videos with voice-overs, all in one place.
Quickly turn any topic, text, PDF, or URL into a professionally designed PowerPoint presentation. With AI-powered content generation, you can edit every detail through conversation and export your work as an editable PPTX or a video with voiceover. 

Key Features
- Multi-source input: Create presentations from a simple topic, pasted text, an uploaded PDF, or a web URL.
- Automated slide design: The AI builds layouts, selects relevant images, and creates diagrams automatically.
- Conversational editing: Refine slides using natural commands to change the tone, shorten text, or add new sections.
- Precision control: Edit any text manually or ask the AI to revise it. Use your own images or generate new AI visuals.
- Export and share: Download a fully editable .pptx file or export your presentation as a video with embedded narration.

How to Use
1. Connect the Awesome Slides app
2. Type "@" and choose the AI Slides app, or type "AI Slides", then enter your prompt

Examples:
- Awesome Slides create a presentation about the history of AI
- Awesome Slides turn this PDF into a 10-slide deck
- Awesome Slides help me make a presentation for my Q3 marketing strategy","mimeType":"mcp/plugin","_meta":{"plugin_id":"plugin_asdk_app_6944fb902e588191a8d2c78c59057984","plugin_name":"app-6944fb902e588191a8d2c78c59057984","plugin_release_id":"pluginrel_5802250127b481919ad2d5cc0ca361bd","plugin_release_version":"1.0.0","apps":["app://asdk_app_6944fb902e588191a8d2c78c59057984"],"skills":[],"mcp_servers":[],"contents":["bundle"],"bundle":"plugin://plugin_asdk_app_6944fb902e588191a8d2c78c59057984/bundle"}},{"server":"codex_apps","uri":"plugin://plugin_connector_68df33b1a2d081918778431a9cfca8ba","name":"plugin_connector_68df33b1a2d081918778431a9cfca8ba","title":"Canva","description":"Bring your Canva design workflow into Codex and create, refine, and review designs through natural conversation.
Available skills:
Resize for social media: Adapt a design for Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn in one step.
Bulk create: Generate multiple designs from spreadsheet data using a brand template.
Edit designs: Update text, media, and formatting, or reposition and resize elements.
Get design feedback: Receive structured feedback on visual hierarchy, layout, readability, consistency, and accessibility.
Implement feedback: Review comment threads and apply clear, actionable changes.
Brand check: Check colors, fonts, logo usage, and copy against your Brand Kit.
Once installed, describe what you want in plain language or invoke Canva directly with @Canva.
Try prompts like:
- @Canva, resize this design for social media.
- @Canva, create designs from this spreadsheet using my brand template.
- @Canva, update the headline in this design.
- @Canva, review this design’s visual hierarchy and readability.
- @Canva, implement the feedback in the comment threads.
- @Canva, check this design against my Brand Kit.

Requirements: Connect your Canva account to use the plugin. Bulk Create requires an eligible Canva Enterprise plan.

Want to take a more hands-on approach? Instantly open your design in Canva’s powerful editor for the final touches.","mimeType":"mcp/plugin","_meta":{"plugin_id":"plugin_connector_68df33b1a2d081918778431a9cfca8ba","plugin_name":"canva","plugin_release_id":"pluginrel_1374763cd71081918dfc119a09491c5a","plugin_release_version":"11.0.0","apps":["app://connector_68df33b1a2d081918778431a9cfca8ba"],"skills":["skill://plugin_connector_68df33b1a2d081918778431a9cfca8ba/canva-branded-presentation","skill://plugin_connector_68df33b1a2d081918778431a9cfca8ba/canva-resize-for-all-social-media","skill://plugin_connector_68df33b1a2d081918778431a9cfca8ba/canva-translate-design","skill://plugin_connector_68df33b1a2d081918778431a9cfca8ba/canva-brand-check","skill://plugin_connector_68df33b1a2d081918778431a9cfca8ba/canva-bulk-create","skill://plugin_connector_68df33b1a2d081918778431a9cfca8ba/canva-edit-design","skill://plugin_connector_68df33b1a2d081918778431a9cfca8ba/canva-design-feedback","skill://plugin_connector_68df33b1a2d081918778431a9cfca8ba/canva-implement-feedback","skill://plugin_connector_68df33b1a2d081918778431a9cfca8ba/canva-resize-for-social-media"],"mcp_servers":[],"contents":["bundle"],"bundle":"plugin://plugin_connector_68df33b1a2d081918778431a9cfca8ba/bundle"}},{"server":"codex_apps","uri":"plugin://Plugin_9e6ca248b5248191ac8c599038990ad9","name":"Plugin_9e6ca248b5248191ac8c599038990ad9","title":"Creative Use when the user wants to change, edit, update, fix, translate, replace, or reformat content in a specific Canva design. This is the safe edit engine that other Canva skills (e.g. implement-feedback) build on.","mimeType":"mcp/skill","_meta":{"plugin_id":"plugin_connector_68df33b1a2d081918778431a9cfca8ba","plugin_name":"canva","plugin_release_id":"pluginrel_1374763cd71081918dfc119a09491c5a","plugin_release_skill_id":"pluginrsk_6a5473ffbf0c819185ba88a837045cfe","skill_name":"canva-edit-design","contents":[]}},{"server":"codex_apps","uri":"skill://plugin_connector_68df33b1a2d081918778431a9cfca8ba/canva-design-feedback","name":"plugin_connector_68df33b1a2d081918778431a9cfca8ba/canva-design-feedback","title":"canva-design-feedback","description":"Read a Canva design and return structured, actionable design feedback — visual hierarchy, copy/messaging, layout & spacing, consistency, readability, and accessibility. I’m blocked by the workspace shell: every filesystem command fails with `bwrap: loopback: Failed RTM_NEWADDR: Operation not permitted`, so I cannot read `input/task.md` or the required companion skill files.

No files were changed. Please restart the workspace/run, or paste `input/task.md` here, and I’ll complete the assignment.
